---
title: ""
description-meta: "Academic website of Lorenzo Bonasera"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
email-obfuscation: javascript
css: pub-listing.css
---

::: {.home-hero}

::: {.home-photo}
![](files/images/profile.png){fig-alt="Lorenzo Bonasera"}


::: {.photo-links}
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/lorebon){target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub"}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/lorenzo-bonasera-999639202){target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn"}
[{{< ai orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7931-5755){target="_blank" aria-label="ORCID"}
:::

:::

::: {.home-intro}
# Lorenzo Bonasera

I am currently a postdoctoral researcher at [DTU Management](https://www.man.dtu.dk/english){.plain-link}, working on the DECIDE project with [David Pisinger](https://hjemmesider.diku.dk/~pisinger/){.plain-link}.
I obtained my PhD in operations research from the University of Pavia and the University of Lugano (USI), under the supervision of [Stefano Gualandi](https://www.compopt.it/home){.plain-link}. I previously worked as a research scientist at the German Aerospace Center (DLR) in the [Institute for AI Safety and Security](https://www.dlr.de/en/ki){.plain-link}, applying Generative AI methods to enhance situational awareness in the maritime domain.

My main research agenda focuses on reducing the arbitrariness in data-driven decision-making. I pursue this goal through two complementary research directions:

- developing interpretable machine learning models;
- designing decision-support systems that account for predictive and prescriptive multiplicity.

You can reach me at: lobon [at] dtu [dot] dk

:::

:::

## Publications

{{< include publications-list.qmd >}}
